rs_config.notes: Correct env var (KNOWHERE_RS_FFI_ENABLE_PARALLEL_HNSW_ADD). Previous runs used wrong name (FFI_ENABLE_PARALLEL_HNSW_ADD_ENV) and were actually serial.

analysis.qps_gap: 3x slower than native (283 vs 848). Consistent with April 3 analysis: gap is in Milvus FFI integration path, not HNSW search algorithm. Standalone RS HNSW ef=128 on 768D Cohere: 1380 single QPS vs Milvus-integrated 284 QPS = 4.9x overhead.
analysis.optimize_improvement: Parallel build (correct env var) reduced optimize from serial (88+ min) to 559s. Note: optimize=168s in invalid run was artificially short due to early search start.
analysis.recall_higher: RS recall 0.964 > native 0.956 (+0.008). Consistent with serial-quality graph from parallel build.
analysis.qps_saturation: QPS flat from concurrency 10-80 (283->281). Single-thread search is the bottleneck, not concurrency.

prev_runs.config: parallel wrong env var (cap64 also wrong)
parallel correct env var, invalid window
